ddls:
CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the promotional campaign */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotional campaign */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount amount or percentage */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Usage limit for the promotional campaign */,
  "used" INTEGER /* Number of times the promotional campaign has been used */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the promotional campaign */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the promotional campaign */,
  "services_name" TEXT /* Name of the service to which the promotion applies */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the promotional campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotional campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the promotional campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotional campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotional campaign */,
  "minimum_spend" TEXT /* Minimum spend requirement for the promotional campaign */,
  "maximum_spend" TEXT /* Maximum spend limit for the promotional campaign */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed, BOGO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_services_name FOREIGN KEY ("services_name") REFERENCES services ("service_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the service */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the service */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, marketer, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotional campaign being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the promotional campaign */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the promotional campaign was used */,
  "amount_saved" TEXT /* Amount saved by the customer using the promotional campaign */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the usage record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_usage_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_promotions" (
  "customer_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-promotion pair */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotional campaign used by the customer */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the promotional campaign was used by the customer */,
  "amount_saved" TEXT /* Amount saved by the customer using the promotional campaign */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the usage record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_promotions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_services" (
  "promotion_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion-service pair */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotional campaign */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service associated with the promotional campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_services_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)
